text:
There once was a tiny, pink rabbit named Fido. He lived in a meadow full of daisies and wild strawberries. Every day, Fido would hop around, searching for something sweet to munch on.

Once upon a time, he discovered a hidden glen filled with hummingbirds. The birds were so fascinated by Fido that they gave him a tiny ruby red flower each day. Fido loved these flowers; they were the sweetest thing he’d ever tasted.

One bright morning, Fido noticed something unusual. There wasn't a single flower. He looked everywhere, calling, but no birds came. Worried, he nibbled on his newest bloom—and it didn’t taste like sugar.

His nose wrinkled. "Oh no," Fido thought. "Could birds have allergies?"

Frantic, he embarked on a quest to find the only bird who’d ever visited the glen. After days of searching without success, Fido grew worried. Just as he was about
